title: Amazon Storage Gateway
description: Schema representing an AWS Storage Gateway resource. A Storage Gateway connects on-premises environments to AWS cloud storage, enabling hybrid cloud storage workflows with local caching for low-latency access.

GatewayARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the gateway.

GatewayId.description: The unique identifier assigned to the gateway.

GatewayTimezone.description: A value that indicates the time zone configured for the gateway.

GatewayState.description: A value that indicates the operating state of the gateway.

Ec2InstanceId.description: The ID of the Amazon EC2 instance that was used to launch the gateway.

Ec2InstanceRegion.description: The AWS Region where the Amazon EC2 instance is located.

GatewayNetworkInterfaces.description: A list of network interfaces on the gateway.

LastSoftwareUpdate.description: The date on which the last software update was applied to the gateway.

NextUpdateAvailabilityDate.description: The date on which an update to the gateway is available.

Tags.description: A list of tags assigned to the gateway.

Ipv4Address.description: The Internet Protocol version 4 (IPv4) address of the interface.

MacAddress.description: The Media Access Control (MAC) address of the interface.

Ipv6Address.description: The Internet Protocol version 6 (IPv6) address of the interface.
